adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 1.5/2 DGs (DG-125 A + DG-125.0.1 shipped y validated Baseline-9b PASS, DG-126 A pending technical DG)

activeDG.title: R18 v1.1 refinements — bare imports info + role=leaf semantics + symbols=1 detectors.ts fix + graph cache (último DG de FASE I)
activeDG.predecessor_baseline_9b_status: PASS empírico cross-model — 0 lines 'triage failed' + 6/6 findings persisted + DG-125 A EmptyResponseError fires + DG-125.0.1 JsonParseError fires

candidate_refinements_from_r18_v1_known_.R1_bare_imports_info: Actualmente imports=1 para colony-db.ts porque bare imports (zod, node-sqlite3-wasm, node:*) están excluidos. Agregar como informational metadata sin resolver a nodos del graph.
candidate_refinements_from_r18_v1_known_.R2_role_leaf_semantics: inferRole devuelve 'leaf' cuando importedByCount === 1 (después del check >= 2 → library). Conventionally 'leaf' implica 0 importers. Refinamiento: 'leaf' solo con importedByCount === 0, 'branch' o 'utility' con 1.
candidate_refinements_from_r18_v1_known_.R3_symbols_count_detectors_ts: detectors.ts muestra symbols=1 en telemetría. Probable bug en extractTypescriptSymbols para archivos con TypeScript patterns específicos (arrow-function-assigned consts, spread arrays, etc.). Investigar y fix.
candidate_refinements_from_r18_v1_known_.R4_graph_cache: Graph se reconstruye cada scan (~500ms-2s + 800ms-2s por WASM init). Cache invalidated by file-mtime hash del content de source files. Aceleraría re-scans en workspaces grandes.
